title: A 5-Month Wait and a 50% Fail Rate: It’s Hard to Get a British Driving License
summary_full: The average wait for a test in England and Scotland has hit 22 weeks, up from five weeks before the pandemic, leading to frustration and attempts to jump the line.
summary_public: The average wait for a test in England and Scotland has hit 22 weeks, up from five weeks before the pandemic, leading to frustration and attempts to jump the line.
